member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Converters.IgnoreAuditFieldsJsonConverter`1
member.summary: A that ignores certain properties on a .
member.remarks: This converter also honors decorations on properties.

summary.para: The converter we create needs to know the exact type we're converting, otherwise you would only get base object properties every time. Therefore it has to be generic. So the Factory creates the right Converter instance type for the object and sends it on its' way.
For more details, see Microsoft's converter documentation.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject
member.summary: A base class for Entity Framework objects to implement , , and in front-end development.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject.IsChanged
member.summary: Specifies whether or not the object has changed.
member.remarks: Setting this manually allows you to override the default behavior in case your app needs it.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject.ShouldTrackChanges
member.summary: Specifies whether or not property value changes should be tracked.
member.remarks: To track changes, call . PropertyChanged events will still be fired, regardless of this setting.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject.AcceptChanges
member.summary: Clears the list and sets to .

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject.AcceptChanges(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clears the list and sets to , and optionally traverses the object graph to call on any children.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject.ClearRelationships
member.summary: Sets any child relationships (0..1:1 or 1:*) to null.
member.remarks: This is typically used to clean an entity before it is POSTed or PUT over an OData API.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject.RejectChanges
member.summary: Loops through the list, sets any property that has changed back to the value it had when was called, clears the list, and sets to .

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject.Set``1(System.String,``0@,``0)
member.summary: Assigns a new value to the property. Then, raises the PropertyChanged event if needed.
member.typeparam: The type of the property that changed.
member.param: The name of the property that changed.
The field storing the property's value.
The property's value after the change occurred.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject.ToDeltaPayload(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Loops through the keys in the list and returns an containing JUST the new values for the properties that changed.
member.returns: An containing JUST the new values for the properties that changed.
member.remarks: If the object implements , then the payload will always include the ID.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject.TrackChanges(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Starts tracking property value changes for every property, optionally activating this behavior for the entire object graph.
member.param: When , loops recursively through the object graph and calls on every object that inherits from .

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject.RecurseGraphInternal``1(CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject,System.Func{CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject,``0},System.Boolean,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.DbObservableObject})
member.remarks: if you want these results to be in a "proper" order, you may need to run a "Reverse" on the resulting enumerable.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.EasyObservableObject
member.summary: A base class for objects to implement .

member.name: E:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.EasyObservableObject.PropertyChanged
member.summary: Occurs when a property value changes.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.EasyObservableObject.PropertyChangedHandler
member.summary: Provides access to the PropertyChanged event handler to derived classes.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.EasyObservableObject.RaisePropertyChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Raises the PropertyChanged event if needed.
member.remarks: If the propertyName parameter does not correspond to an existing property on the current class, an exception is thrown in DEBUG configuration only.
member.param: The name of the property that changed.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.EasyObservableObject.RaisePropertyChanged``1(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0}})
member.summary: Raises the PropertyChanged event if needed.
member.typeparam: The type of the property that changed.
member.param: An expression identifying the property that changed.

member.summary: Assigns a new value to the property. Then, raises the PropertyChanged event if needed.
member.typeparam: The type of the property that changed.
member.param: An expression identifying the property that changed.
The field storing the property's value.
The property's value after the change occurred.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.EasyObservableObject.Set``1(System.String,``0@,``0)
member.summary: Assigns a new value to the property. Then, raises the PropertyChanged event if needed.
member.typeparam: The type of the property that changed.
member.param: The name of the property that changed.
The field storing the property's value.
The property's value after the change occurred.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Ensure.ArgumentNotNull(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Ensures that the specified argument is not null.
member.param: Name of the argument.
The argument.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IActiveTrackable
member.summary: An interface that implements the CloudNimble common pattern for tracking who created an Entity.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IActiveTrackable.IsActive
member.summary: The unique identifier for the User that created this particular Entity.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.ICreatedAuditable
member.summary: An interface that implements the CloudNimble common pattern for tracking who created an Entity.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.ICreatedAuditable.DateCreated
member.summary: The unique identifier for the User that created this particular Entity.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.ICreatorTrackable`1
member.summary: An interface that implements the CloudNimble common pattern for tracking who created an Entity.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.ICreatorTrackable`1.CreatedById
member.summary: The unique identifier for the User that created this particular Entity.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IDbEnum
member.summary: An interface that represents the CloudNimble database-driven enumeration pattern that lets you update the Enum as processes change without changing the meaning of Entities that are linked to the older enums.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IDbStateEnum
member.summary: An interface that identifies this Entity as being the enumeration details for the SimpleStateMachine.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IDbStateEnum.InstructionText
member.summary: Text to display to the user regarding the current state, and what needs to happen next.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IDbStateEnum.PrimaryTargetDisplayText
member.summary: A string that describes the next action in the SimpleStateMachine, usually displayed on a button or link.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IDbStateEnum.PrimaryTargetSortOrder
member.summary: An integer that represents the State the Entity should be moved to once this action completes successfully.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IDbStateEnum.SecondaryTargetDisplayText
member.summary: A string that describes an alternate action in the SimpleStateMachine. This action could skip States moving forward, or return the Entity to a previous State. This text is usually displayed on a button or link.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IDbStateEnum.SecondaryTargetSortOrder
member.summary: An integer that represents an alternate State the Entity should be moved to once this action is finished.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IDbStatusEnum
member.summary: An interface that identifies this Entity as being the enumeration details for the SimpleStateMachine.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IHasState`1
member.summary: An interface that specifes an implementing Entity changes State as part of the SimpleStateMachine.
member.typeparam: The type implementing that represents States for this Entity.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IHasState`1.StateType
member.summary: The populated instance of .

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IHasState`1.StateTypeId
member.summary: The unique identifier for the SimpleStateMachine .

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IHasStatus`1
member.summary: An interface that specifes an implementing Entity contains a child Entity of T that implements and represents the Entity's current status.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IHasStatus`1.StatusType
member.summary: The populated instance of .

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IHasStatus`1.StatusTypeId
member.summary: The unique identifier for the SimpleStateMachine .

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IHumanReadable
member.summary: An interface that specifies the implementing Entity displays text to the user.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IHumanReadable.DisplayName
member.summary: The text to be displayed to the user.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IIdentifiable`1
member.summary: An interface that guarantees a particular Entity contains an "Id" property with a type .

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IIdentifiable`1.Id
member.summary: The unique identifier for this particular Entity.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.ISortable
member.summary: An interface that specifies the implementing Entity can be contains an that tracks the order items should be displayed in a list.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.ISortable.SortOrder
member.summary: The order this entity should be displayed in a list.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IUpdatedAuditable
member.summary: An interface that implements the CloudNimble common pattern for tracking who created an Entity.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IUpdatedAuditable.DateUpdated
member.summary: The unique identifier for the User that created this particular Entity.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IUpdaterTrackable`1
member.summary: An interface that implements the CloudNimble common pattern for tracking who updated an Entity.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IUpdaterTrackable`1.UpdatedById
member.summary: The unique identifier for the User that updated this particular Entity.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1
member.summary: Describes an interval of time to be used in time-based calculations.
member.typeparam: The data type for the interval value.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1.Type
member.summary: The base unit that describes what the quantity of this Interval references.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1.Value
member.summary: The duration of the Interval.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1.DebuggerDisplay
member.summary: Returns a string suitable for display in the debugger. Ensures such strings are compiled by the runtime and not interpreted by the currently-executing language.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1.#ctor
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1.#ctor(`0,CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IntervalType)
member.summary: Creates a new instance of the class.
member.param: The duration of the interval.
he base unit that describes what the quantity of this Interval references.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1.PerMinute
member.summary: Given this instance, how many of X will happen per minute?
member.exception: Thrown if is not convertible to a .
member.remarks: If you need this as a whole number, wrap the result in .

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1.PerHour
member.exception: Thrown if is not convertible to a .

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1.PerDay
member.exception: Thrown if is not convertible to a .

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1.PerWeek
member.exception: Thrown if is not convertible to a .

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1.PerMonth
member.exception: Thrown if is not convertible to a .

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.Interval`1.PerYear
member.exception: Thrown if is not convertible to a .

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.IntervalType
member.summary: Specifies the type of interval duration.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.MoneyInterval`1
member.summary: Represents a sum of money to be exchanged during a given interval.
member.remarks: This has been broken up to allow for conversions (for example, converting $/month into $/day) to be self-contained. This should reduce duplication.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.MoneyInterval`1.Money
member.summary: The amount of money represented by the given

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.MoneyInterval`1.DebuggerDisplay
member.summary: Returns a string suitable for display in the debugger. Ensures such strings are compiled by the runtime and not interpreted by the currently-executing language.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.MoneyInterval`1.#ctor
member.summary: The default constructor for a MoneyInterval instance.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.NameOf
member.summary: Fills a gap in by allowing you to use deep name references instead of local name references.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.NameOf.Full``1(System.String,System.Linq.Expressions.Expression{System.Func{``0,System.Object}},System.String)
member.summary: Allows you to create a source name expression when you need to have a prefixing variable in the result.
member.param: The characters used to separate the from the result.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.PercentageInterval`1
member.summary: Represents a sum of money to be exchanged during a given interval.
member.remarks: This has been broken up to allow for conversions (for example, converting $/month into $/day) to be self-contained. This should reduce duplication.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.PercentageInterval`1.Rate
member.summary: The amount of money represented by the given

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.PercentageInterval`1.DebuggerDisplay
member.summary: Returns a string suitable for display in the debugger. Ensures such strings are compiled by the runtime and not interpreted by the currently-executing language.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.PercentageInterval`1.#ctor
member.summary: The default constructor for a MoneyInterval instance.

member.name: T:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.RatioInterval`1
member.summary: Represents a decimal value calculated over a given interval. Could be a dollar value or a ratio, depending on the situation.
member.remarks: This has been broken up to allow for conversions (for example, converting $/month into $/day) to be self-contained. This should reduce duplication.

member.name: P:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.RatioInterval`1.DebuggerDisplay
member.summary: Returns a string suitable for display in the debugger. Ensures such strings are compiled by the runtime and not interpreted by the currently-executing language.

member.name: M:CloudNimble.EasyAF.Core.RatioInterval`1.#ctor
member.summary: The default constructor for a MoneyInterval instance.

member.name: T:System.EasyAF_DateTimeExtensions
member.summary: Extensions on and .

member.name: M:System.EasyAF_DateTimeExtensions.GetQuarter(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Calculates the quarter for the given , assuming a calendar-based fiscal year.
member.param: The to use in the calculation.

member.name: M:System.EasyAF_DateTimeExtensions.GetQuarter(System.DateTime,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Calculates the quarter for the given , assuming a the provided fiscal year begin date.
member.param: The to use in the calculation.
The representing the start day of the fiscal year to use in calculation.

member.name: M:System.EasyAF_DateTimeExtensions.GetQuarter(System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Calculates the quarter for the given , assuming a calendar-based fiscal year.
member.param: The to use in the calculation.

member.name: M:System.EasyAF_DateTimeExtensions.GetQuarter(System.DateTimeOffset,System.DateTimeOffset)
member.summary: Calculates the quarter for the given , assuming a the provided fiscal year begin date.
member.param: The to use in the calculation.
The representing the start day of the fiscal year to use in calculation.

member.name: M:System.EasyAF_ExceptionExtensions.TraceDemystifiedException(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Demystifies the Exception and writes it to .
member.param: The exception instance to manipulate.
A string that will be prepended to the log entry. Defaults to the calling function name.

member.name: T:System.EasyAF_GuidExtensions
member.summary: Methods to extend in useful ways.

member.name: M:System.EasyAF_GuidExtensions.ToComparableString(System.Guid)
member.summary: A little syntactical sugar to make sure GUIDs are outputted to a format that ensures accurate string comparisons.
member.param: The Guid to convert.
member.returns: An upper-case string representing the GUID instance to be compared.

member.name: M:System.EasyAF_GuidExtensions.IsNullOrEmpty(System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: A sweet little extension to check if a Nullable Guid has a real value or not.
member.returns: A indicating whether or not the Guid is null or empty.

member.name: M:MoreLinq.MoreEnumerable.DistinctBy``2(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,``1})
member.summary: Returns all distinct elements of the given source, where "distinctness" is determined via a projection and the default equality comparer for the projected type.
member.remarks: This operator uses deferred execution and streams the results, although a set of already-seen keys is retained. If a key is seen multiple times, only the first element with that key is returned.
member.param: Source sequence
Projection for determining "distinctness"
member.returns: A sequence consisting of distinct elements from the source sequence, comparing them by the specified key projection.

member.name: M:MoreLinq.MoreEnumerable.DistinctBy``2(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,``1},System.Collections.Generic.IEqualityComparer{``1})
member.summary: Returns all distinct elements of the given source, where "distinctness" is determined via a projection and the specified comparer for the projected type.
member.remarks: This operator uses deferred execution and streams the results, although a set of already-seen keys is retained. If a key is seen multiple times, only the first element with that key is returned.
member.param: Source sequence
Projection for determining "distinctness"
The equality comparer to use to determine whether or not keys are equal. If null, the default equality comparer for TSource is used.
member.returns: A sequence consisting of distinct elements from the source sequence, comparing them by the specified key projection.
